Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Monica Castillo, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JUAN CASTILLO.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SUSANA CORREA and JOSE FLORES.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Juan Castillo sworn and examinded on his own behalf through Spanish Interpreter John Judah Medina.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
Against Defendant Susana Correa:
Damages: $29,933.25
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Against Defendant Jose Flores:
Damages: $18,300.oo
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Court granted total cost of $183.00
Counsel to prepare a form of Judgment and submit proposed judgment on or before July 7, 2014.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Continued To Aug-12-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
